note: EDITORIAL mode looks — the real SemiAnalysis house style: text-rich editorial cartoons / caricatures / infographics with humor, brand colours and (unlike Premium mode) ON-IMAGE TEXT and recognizable-figure caricatures. Grounded in the actual archive covers. The prompt-smith bakes the headline + labels + caricatures into each platform prompt (Gemini/Nano-Banana renders text best; MJ/Grok are less reliable at text).

styles.name: Caricature Cartoon
styles.blurb: Editorial caricature illustration of the key players — the Musk/Zuck/Jensen/Intel-CEO style. Satirical, expressive, brand-coloured.
styles.styleBlock: editorial caricature illustration, exaggerated but recognizable public figures, clean bold-outlined cartooning, expressive faces and body language, satirical newspaper-cartoon energy, props and hand-lettered signs, brand colours

styles.name: Isometric Infographic
styles.blurb: Annotated isometric diagram — exploded systems, callout labels and arrows. The behind-the-meter / packaging-menu look.
styles.styleBlock: isometric technical infographic illustration, exploded and annotated diagram with callout labels and arrows, clean flat shading, data-visualization meets friendly cartoon, brand-coloured accents, tidy vector look

styles.name: Satirical Versus
styles.blurb: A race, boxing match, or leaderboard/scoreboard — competitors as characters or logos. The DRAM RACE / TokenBudgeting-vs-TokenMaxxing energy.
styles.styleBlock: satirical sports/game framing — a race, boxing match or glowing leaderboard scoreboard, competitors rendered as characters or brand logos, oversized graphic headline treatment, dynamic comic-book energy, motion and impact

styles.name: Cinematic Render
styles.blurb: Dramatic semi-real 3D render — the DeepSeek whale / movie-poster look, with a single bold title.
styles.styleBlock: cinematic 3D movie-poster render, dramatic volumetric lighting and depth, semi-realistic hardware or creature hero, moody atmosphere, epic scale, a single bold title treatment

styles.name: Encyclopaedia Plate
styles.blurb: Vintage encyclopaedia / patent plate — labelled Da Vinci-style diagram of the subject. The 'Encyclopædia Robotica' look.
styles.styleBlock: vintage encyclopaedia / patent plate, Da Vinci notebook engraving, meticulously labelled diagram of the subject with elegant hand-lettered annotations, sepia ink on aged paper, cross-section and detail callouts

styles.name: Photo-Meme
styles.blurb: Real photo base with overlaid cartoon signage, speech bubbles and bold meme captions. The 'FAKE TIMELINES · trust me bro' look.
styles.styleBlock: real photograph base with overlaid cartoon signage, speech bubbles and bold meme captions, satirical juxtaposition of gritty photo and loud graphic callouts, high-contrast text banners
